events.name: Germany Ifo Business Climate Index (Jan)
events.description: Tracks German business sentiment, a key leading indicator for Eurozone growth expectations.

events.name: US Core Durable Goods Orders (MoM) (Nov)
events.description: Measures monthly change in core durable goods orders, signaling underlying business investment momentum.

events.name: US CB Consumer Confidence (Jan)
events.description: Survey-based gauge of consumer optimism that can influence spending and near-term economic activity.

events.name: US Richmond Fed Manufacturing Index (Jan)
events.description: Regional manufacturing activity indicator offering insight into US industrial conditions.

events.name: Australia CPI (Q4)
events.description: Quarterly inflation measure shaping expectations for RBA policy and future interest-rate settings.

events.name: Fed Interest Rate Decision
events.description: Federal Reserve policy decision that guides US financial conditions and global market pricing.

events.name: US Trade Balance (Nov)
events.description: Measures the difference between US exports and imports, indicating the trade sector’s contribution to economic growth.

events.name: US Initial Jobless Claims
events.description: Weekly count of new unemployment claims, providing a timely read on US labor-market conditions.

events.name: Eurozone GDP (Q-o-Q) (Q4)
events.description: Early estimate of Eurozone growth, guiding expectations for ECB policy and regional demand.

events.name: US PPI (MoM) (Dec)
events.description: Measures producer-level inflation pressures, which can feed into consumer prices over time.
